prompt:
Backyard hammock golden hour variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s lounging sideways on a warm cream cotton hammock strung between two trees in a sunlit garden backyard, mid-afternoon golden light. She rests on one elbow, knees gently bent. She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a serene soft smile, mid-bite. She wears a fitted oat-cream rib tank top and high-rise olive linen drawstring pants, hair down loose in soft waves, fresh-faced sun-kissed glow, no heavy makeup.

WARM DAPPLED NATURAL SUNLIGHT filtering through tree leaves overhead FALLS DIRECTLY onto the JAR sitting on a small woven rattan side-table beside the hammock — the dappled sunlight visibly hits the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, the bold yellow lettering, and the curved black plastic side with a clean warm rim-light. The label glows as the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower portion of the frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the same dappled sunlight. A few loose cubes scattered on the woven table next to the dish. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: a softly out-of-focus lush garden — tall green hedge, a hint of wildflowers, the trunk of one of the trees, a soft glow of golden afternoon sunlight through leaves, warm depth, atmospheric haze.

Lighting: warm directional dappled afternoon sunlight from the upper-left wrapping BOTH the jar AND the woman — same beam catches her hair, cheek, and the jar's label, integrating subject and product in the same natural light. Color grade is warm and slightly saturated golden tones, editorial wellness-brand feel (Goop / Alo / Athletic Greens / outdoor summer campaign).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman in the hammock, gummy held in the upper-third near her face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the side-table with direct sunlight on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture with a soft natural glow, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
